svg.text: Sequential pipeline: receives only from Phase 2

g.text: Atom + top-5 caps + MS Learn refs + prior fitments

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Drill down Phase 3 Step 1 sub-step A: how does pairwise cosine work on the RetrievalContext vectors?')
sendPrompt('Drill down Phase 3 Step 1 sub-step B: how does spaCy extract D365 entities for overlap?')
sendPrompt('Drill down Phase 3 Step 1 sub-step C: how is overlap ratio computed?')

g.text: Output: SimilarityVector[] — cosine + overlap + entity pairs per cap

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Drill down Phase 3 Step 2 sub-step A: what are the four signals and how are they weighted?')
sendPrompt('Drill down Phase 3 Step 2 sub-step B: how does the weighted composite formula work per module?')
sendPrompt('Drill down Phase 3 Step 2 sub-step C: what are the threshold bands and anomaly detection rules?')

g.text: Output: ConfidenceResult — composite score + band + route decision

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Drill down Phase 3 Step 3 sub-step A: multi-factor ranking with module specificity')
sendPrompt('Drill down Phase 3 Step 3 sub-step B: deduplication and subsumption logic')
sendPrompt('Drill down Phase 3 Step 3 sub-step C: historical boost and final ordering')

g.text: Libraries: scikit-learn (normalize + weighted sum), custom Python
